hypothesis: A targeted Qwen3.6:35b direct run on recurrent validation failure modes (unknown/no-reference, no-content nulls, highest-current frequency, year-to-date denominators, cluster shape, short seizure-free threshold, infrequent quantified over-unknown) gates prompt v2.2 before cap-25 or full validation.
metric_caveats: Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing on this slice only.
Normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, and evidence support are diagnostic.
Do not extrapolate slice metrics to full-validation performance.
This is not published Gan benchmark reproduction.
